entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: 'n duidelike voorkant wat een idee vra.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: 'n veelvoorkomde valkuil wat waarschuwt vir 'n waarschijnlijke fout.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: 'n beknopte achterkant wat die gedachte afmaakt.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: 'n wenk wat help sonder alles weg te gee.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: 'n herhaalkeuse zodat gemiste kaarte eerder terugkomen.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: 'n eenvoudige flitskaart-werkvloei

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: 'n sterker kaart vra om aktiewe herroeping:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: 'n nuttige kaart vra een ding. Hulle mag geen vijf vrae in een prompt verbergen. Hulle moet spesifiek genoeg is om te besluitantwoorde, maar nie zo smal dat hulle betekenisloos word.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: 'n swak AI-flitskaart se:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: aktiewe herroeping

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Voeg wenke by sonder die antwoord weg te gee

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI kan help flitskaarte vinnigler te maak, maar wat leer kom nog steeds uit aktief ophalen. As die hulpmiddel die kaarte skryf en die leerder nooit moeite doen om hulle te besluitantwoorde, is er byna nies verander. Die nuttige versie verander rommelige notas in gefokusde prompts en laat die leerder daarna herinneren voordat die antwoord word onthuld.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI kan ruwe notas omstapten in schonere prompts vir aktiewe herroeping. Die kan bree idees opdeel in kleiner kaarte, voorbeelde toevoegen en valkuilen aanwysen wat 'n leerder kan mis.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI-flitskaarte en aktiewe herroeping: zo onthoud jy meer

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: pas 'n konsep by op 'n klein voorbeeld.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Vra om kaarte met een idee, wenke en veelvoorkomde valkuilen.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Achterkant: "Spreiding dwingt wat geheugen om die antwoord na enige vergeetachtigheid weer op te bouwen, wat latere herinnering versterkt."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: twee idees vergelyk;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: 'n term definiëren;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: Verwijder kaarte wat te breed of te vanzelfpraatd is.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Herhaal nie alles evenveel

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Makkelijk. Schuif wat later deur.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: 'n oorzaak verduidelik;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards is 'n van die eenvoudigste manieren om hierdie te doen.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards is krachtig, maar hulle is nie wat hele studieproses. Hulle is die beste vir retrieval, woordeskat, definities, formules, onderscheidingen en belangrike voorbeelde. Hulle is swakr wanneer die leerder die idee in die eerste plek nog nooit wat verstaan.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards werk die beste wanneer hulle een idee tegelyk toetse, antwoorde pas na inspanning tonen en gemiste kaarte vinnigler herhalen.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Vir 'n dieper roete lees jy die Flashcard Builder-gids en die Flashcard Builder-prompts en studielus. Die doel is nie 'n mooie set kaarte. Die doel is meer onthou wanneer die aantekeningen weg is.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: Bijvoorbeeld:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Voorkant: "Waarom werk gespreid herhalen beter dan stampen?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Moeilijk. Herhaal na 'n kort pauze.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "Dink aan vergeten en retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Hints is nuttig wanneer hulle inspanning behou. 'n slechte wenk is die antwoord in vermomming. 'n goede wenk verkleint die zoekruimte.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: 'n veelgemaakte fout identifiseer;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: As 'n kaart bly mislukken, herhaal wat dan nie net. Vra waarom wat moeilik is. Gebruik Socratic Instruction om die wanopvatting bloot te leggen, Math Step Coach vir procedurele hiaten, of die AI-leerpromptbiblioteek om 'n beter studieprompt te vind.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Flashcard Builder is ontwerp rondom wat active-recall-lus: bou 'n deck, probeer die voorkant, onthul die antwoord, beoordeel jy herinnering en herhaal die missers totdat die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Gemist. Herhaal binnekort.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: 'n fout wat leerders maak, is elke kaart dieselfde hanteer. As jy 'n kaart direk kent, kan wat more weer herhalen tijdverspilling is. As jy 'n kaart mis, kan 'n week wag te lank is.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Koppel flitskaarte aan begrip

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Plak 'n klein stuk notas in Flashcard Builder.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Fotosynthese: wat proses waarmee planten voedsel maak.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Beoordeel jy herinnering eerlik.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Leesnotas maak voel produkief. Hulle later onthou is die regte test.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: 'n reeks onthou;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Herhaal sonder na die achterkant te kijken.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Sterke kaarte besluitvat dikwels:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: studievaardighede

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: Die wenk help die leerder te begin sonder wat herinneren weg te neem. inspir's Flashcard Builder is ontwerp vir hierdie onthul-en-beoordeel-lus: eers probeer, daarna onthullen, eerlik beoordeel en swak kaarte eerder laat terugkomen.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: Daarom is aktiewe herroeping belangrik. In plek van na die antwoord te kijken, probeer jy wat uit jy geheugen op te haal. Die inspanning versterkt wat geheugen en laat sien wat nog aandacht nodig wat.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Die leerder moet wat herinneren nog steeds self doen. Dat is wat punt.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Die tweede kaart laat die leerder 'n relatie ophalen, nie net 'n zin herken. Goede kaarte richten homself meestal op 'n van hierdie take:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: Hierdie hoeft nie ingewikkeld te is. Die belangrikste is dat jy herhalingsskedule reageert op jy geheugen in plaas van wat deck as 'n statische lijst te besluithandeel.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Probeer wat in Flashcard Builder. As jy die onderwerp moet begrijpen voordat jy kaarte maak, begin dan met Learn Anything. As jy na wat herhalen van kaarte wat druk wil, gaan dan na Quiz My On Trivia of Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: Verander notas om in beter kaarte

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: Verander herhaalde missers om in 'n vraag vir Learn Anything.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Gebruik hierdie lus:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Gebruik drie beoordelingen:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: Wat is die rol van chlorofyl in fotosintese?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: Wat 'n goede flitskaart maak

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Wanneer jy notas in AI plak, vraag dan om bree ideeen op te splitsen in wat take. 'n set met 18 spesifieke kaarte is meestal beter dan 'n set met 5 enorme kaarte wat elke 'n hele paragraaf bevat.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: Waar AI help
